events: Heretic Questioner reveals opposing quest to defend the empire
Heretic Questioner argues slavery accelerates civilization and asks party to surrender
Group fails to reach consensus after two-hour meeting
Death King observes goblin slaves living in terrible conditions in salt mines
Death King considers time regression to change Heretic Questioner's path
Bae Hu-ryeong advises against regression and tells Death King to trust the goblins
Goblins secretly gather in underground mine passages and create a secret assembly
loops: Death King considers using time regression but decides against it after Bae Hu-ryeong's advice
cause_effect: Heretic Questioner's intervention -> civilization advanced to ancient era in 200 years but through slavery and religion
Snail oppression of goblins -> goblins create secret underground assembly to organize rebellion
chapters.notes: The goblins are secretly organizing rebellion against their snail oppressors. Heretic Questioner believes his authoritarian methods are justified by faster historical progress. Death King nearly regresses but Bae Hu-ryeong convinces him to let the goblins fight their own battle.

events: Dog Sound Theater Company's fire plays sell out repeatedly
Death King trains hobgoblin actors using martial arts choreography mixed with primitive goblin movements
Heretic erosion rate drops from 44% to 28%
Death King plans to retire and return Ssonia's body after completing his mission
Black Dragon Master completes her quest and visits Death King disguised as a vampire
Black Dragon Master recognizes Death King despite his elf body
Black Dragon Master watches Burning Grave practice and is amazed
Black Dragon Master teleports Crusader in mermaid form inside a bathtub to the theater
cause_effect: Death King's choreography training -> heretic erosion rate drops significantly
Black Dragon Master completing quest -> visits Death King instead of leaving stage
Black Dragon Master recognizing Death King's work -> brings Crusader for musical expertise
chapters.notes: Death King is possessing an elf named Kekerkker and has become a famous actor/choreographer. Black Dragon Master is disguised as an old vampire. Crusader appears as a mermaid in a bathtub.

events: Crusader and Black Dragon Master argue about Crusader's past as jazz musician
Death King learns Crusader was a Venezuelan refugee and music school graduate who performed jazz concerts
Black Dragon Master reveals Crusader's nickname was Night Sky
Crusader watches Fire Play practice and is amazed
Crusader explains Death King created composite art with aura (Aura Art)
Crusader demonstrates aura-based music creation
Black Dragon Master proposes promoting Aura Art nationally and creating an art guild
Black Dragon Master and Crusader excessively praise Death King
Black Dragon Master makes Death King the guild leader of the new art guild
cause_effect: Death King mixing martial arts with fire plays -> creation of Aura Art (composite art where actors create their own music with aura)
Black Dragon Master's competitive nature about Tower's reputation -> wants to create art guild to make Tower cultural exporters
Excessive flattery from Black Dragon Master and Crusader -> Death King accepts guild leader position despite hesitation
chapters.notes: The Crusader reveals her hidden musical background as a jazz performer. Black Dragon Master manipulates Death King into becoming the figurehead leader of a new art guild through relentless praise. Ssonia remarks on how easy Death King is to manipulate.
